name: Minimap
description:
You gain access to a /yminimap/x on the top right of your screen When having either a /lmap/x or /lphoto album/x anywhere in your inventory. 

With the minimap active, press /g[M]/x to open the world map.

Right click anywhere to name a marker visible for all players.

Hover over and press /g[DEL]/x to delete a marker.

/iCompass, barometer, calendar also show useful overlays on your screen./x
